source: Cheng, Kahng, Kundu, Wang, Wang, ISPD 2023 assessment of RL macro placement, Sec. 5.2.3 [@ChengEtAl2023AssessmentRL]; per-run table in the companion TILOS-AI-Institute/MacroPlacement repository, Docs/OurProgress Question 10 (cited by the paper as its detail source), https://github.com/TILOS-AI-Institute/MacroPlacement/tree/main/Docs/OurProgress#Question10
notes: 15 Circuit Training macro placements of one testcase, Ariane133-NG45-68%-1.3ns, all with proxy cost < 0.9, bucket-sampled by the authors from ~40 runs; transcribed verbatim, accessed 2026-07-13. Proxy cost = wirelength + 0.5*congestion + 0.5*density.
